raw_text: sofia earni d. no 67-1-1, ground floor, beside sbi bank, rajeswari nagar, lb nagarmain road, kakinada533003 mobile no: +917995726934 /email: sofiajoseph219@gmail.com https://uk.linkedin.com/in/sofia-earni-8476178a profile: recently completed beng (hons) aerospace engineering, i would like to seek admission for the masters program in aircraft system integration at universidad carlos lll madrid to learn and acquire a global vision of aero industry. my final year project was performance enhancement of single engine light general aviation aircraft which included incorporating modern aerofoil with advanced aerodynamics into the single engine aircrafts and observing the performance. i have also attended a flight laboratory course given by the national flying laboratory centre at cranfield university. educational qualifications: 2014 2016 beng (hons) aerospace engineering / sheffield hallam university (direct entry into year 2) 2011-2013 level 5 btec higher national diploma in aerospace engineering / indian institute of aeronautical engineering, india i have successfully achieved first class grades in higher national diploma in aerospace which led to a lateral entry admission into beng (hons). 2009-2011 a/as levels / narayana educational institutions, india 2006-2009 o levels / ashram public school, india projects: 2015-2016performance enhancement of general aviation aircraft (final year dissertation) critical appraisal and comparison of aerodynamics section characteristics of old and modern aero foils. devise a rational scheme which will use characteristics only applied to a base line aircraft for generating performance parameters. 2015-2016sustainable civil airliner design conceptual aircraft design aircraft design demonstration jet engine nozzles to understand how the fluid property changes inside a convergent divergent nozzle, and ways to maximise the thrust generated. skills gained - 3d modelling nozzles, cfd analysis, analytical calculations using excel and matlab. work experience: 2015-on goingcourse ambassador / sheffield hallam university talking with prospective students, parents and visitors about my experience of being a student at sheffield hallam university. answering questions the guests may have regarding the course and the university. 2015 -on going estates project assistant / sheffield hallam university assisting the staff as they are enhancing and expanding engineering facilities of the university. talking to student and knowing their opinion on the refurbishment. skills: software:ms office, window operating system, catia v5, ansys, solidworks, abaqus and hypermesh. leadership:the project leader for the group project in which i co-ordinate and oversee the work of the group members and act as the main point of contact. i maintain an updated timesheet detailing actions completed/outstanding, project plan in the form of gantt chart. culturalawareness: interested knowing about various religions, traditions and cultures which helped me to adapt and work with different people who have different personalities. languages: english, hindi, telugu interests: member for the institution of engineering and technology (iet) & institution of mechanical engineers active member in the church choir, skits and other church activities such as volunteering at many church and charity events. interested in travelling to places and occasionally play basketball i read online blogs like engadget, aviation week and other news site as i like to keep myself up-to-date with new discoveries, aerospace, computer related and scientific technologies in the market. references: dr. xinjun cui mr. ramakrishna chalapathi sheffield hallam universitynarayana educational institutes email:acesxc@exchange.shu.ac.uk contact number: +919912342814
